name: AutoComplete
description: An accessible autocomplete combobox for searching and selecting options from a list with screen reader and keyboard support.

keyboardNavigation.description: Moves focus to the next item in the suggestions list.
Moves focus to the previous item in the suggestions list.
Selects the currently active item and closes the suggestion list.

ariaAttributes.description: Indicates the input behaves as a combobox control.
Indicates whether the suggestions list is open or closed.
Identifies the list container of suggestions.
Identifies each item inside the suggestions listbox.
